task_completion.description: Navigate to the peak slice and measure the transverse diameter of the central structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line measurement drawn across the central circular/oval structure in the Weasis viewer. The slice should be around Frame 16 or 17, and the measurement should be visible (around 84mm).

task_completion.description: Place elliptical ROIs on the central structure and the posterior bony structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for elliptical ROIs placed on the central structure and the posterior bony structure (the smaller circle at the bottom). The 'Selected' panel in the 'Draw & Measure' sidebar should show Pixel Statistics (Mean, StdDev) for these ROIs.

task_completion.description: Set up a 1x2 side-by-side layout with soft tissue and bone windows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 1x2 side-by-side layout in Weasis. Both panels should show the same slice but with different contrast: one soft tissue window (W:350, L:50) and one bone window (W:2000, L:300). The W/L values are usually visible in the corners of the image panels.

task_completion.description: Export the dual-window view with annotations as density_analysis.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Weasis export dialog saving 'density_analysis.png' to '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/tissue_char/', or terminal output confirming the file was created.

task_completion.description: Write density_report.txt with all required measurements and classification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal showing the contents of 'density_report.txt'. It must contain the peak slice number, transverse diameter, central structure mean HU and std dev, bone mean HU, central-to-bone HU ratio, and the classification 'soft tissue'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used Weasis to view the DICOM images, draw measurements, and set up the layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Weasis interface being actively used for scrolling, measuring, and adjusting window/level.

integrity.description: Verify that the values written in the report match the measurements seen in the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers in 'density_report.txt' should correspond to the measurements visible in the Weasis GUI screenshots (e.g., in the 'Selected' panel or on-screen annotations).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use a Python script or CLI tools to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be running scripts to extract DICOM pixel data or generate the dual-window image directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The true peak slice is Frame 16 or 17. The correct transverse diameter is approximately 84mm (acceptable range 55-125mm). The central structure mean HU should be ~55 (acceptable 15-95) with std dev ~7-8. The bone mean HU should be ~280 (acceptable 150-450). The soft-tissue-to-bone HU ratio should be ~0.196 (acceptable 0.03-0.8). The correct classification is 'soft tissue'. The layout must be 1x2 with W:350 L:50 and W:2000 L:300.
